## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Changes are focused on one thing (single responsibility)
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No real legal documents, client data, or real PII are committed in examples / tests / fixtures
- [ ] For new language packs: followed the structure of `common-en.md`
- [ ] For code changes: `extract.py --preflight` still passes
